description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, characterized by clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front features a covered carport with a driveway made of stone pavers, and a small landscaped garden with shrubs and trees. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private backyard with a patio, outdoor seating area, and a small pool surrounded by greenery. The side yard includes additional landscaping and a pathway leading to the backyard. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, functional outdoor areas, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, carport, landscaped gardens, and a backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport with a parked car, stone driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive window arrangement, side garden, and a glimpse of the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor seating, small pool, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and additional landscaping, with the pool and patio partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on all facades
